# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      name: {{ env "GCP_PROJECT_ID" }}-network
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      name: {{ env "GCP_PROJECT_ID" }}-instance-template
      machineType: n1-standard-1
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            diskSizeGb: 20
      networkInterfaces:
        - accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

  - name: instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      name: {{ env "GCP_PROJECT_ID" }}-instance-group
      baseInstanceName: {{ env "GCP_PROJECT_ID" }}-instance-template-
      targetSize: 3

  - name: sql-db-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1.databaseInstance
    properties:
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_11
      region: {{ env "GCP_REGION" }}
      settings:
        tier: db-n1-standard-1

  - name: storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      storageClass: REGIONAL
      location: {{ env "GCP_REGION" }}

  - name: load-balancer-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.regionBackendService
    properties:
      name: {{ env "GCP_PROJECT_ID" }}-load-balancer-backend-service
      healthChecks:
        - ${load-balancer-health-check.selfLink}
      protocol: HTTP
      ports:
        - port: 80

  - name: load-balancer-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.regionTargetHttpHandler
    properties:
      urlMap: ${load-balancer-url-map.selfLink}

  - name: load-balancer-target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      urlMaps:
        - ${load-balancer-url-map.selfLink}
